paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Item-based collaborative filtering recommendation algorithms, Sarwar+（with Konstan）, WWW'01, 2021.04
paper-entry.tags: RecommenderSystems, CollaborativeFiltering, ItemBased, WWW, Selected Papers/Blogs, One-Line Notes

maintainer-comment-text.p: アイテムベースな協調フィルタリングを提案した論文（GroupLens）
